schemaVersion.description: The version of this schema that will be used to validate JSON data

limit.description: Number of results to return per page.

offset.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

ordering.description: Which field to use when ordering the results.

id.description: A unique integer value identifying this user shelter.

username.title: Имя пользователя
username.description: Обязательное поле. Не более 150 символов. Только буквы, цифры и символы @/./+/-/_.
